# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Target - Build, Test, Comment

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write

concurrency:
  group: pr-target-tests-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build_test_and_comment:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code (untrusted)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: refs/pull/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/merge
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        id: build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Test
        id: test
        run: npm test

      - name: Prepare comment body
        if: always()
        id: comment
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          build_outcome="${{ steps.build.outcome }}"
          test_outcome="${{ steps.test.outcome }}"
          job_status="${{ job.status }}"
          sha="${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}"
          pr="${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
          repo="${{ github.repository }}"
          run_url="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"

          {
            echo "### CI results"
            echo ""
            echo "- Repository: \`${repo}\`"
            echo "- PR: #${pr}"
            echo "- Commit: \`${sha}\`"
            echo "- Build: **${build_outcome}**"
            echo "- Tests: **${test_outcome}**"
            echo "- Overall: **${job_status}**"
            echo ""
            echo "[View workflow run](${run_url})"
          } > comment.md

      - name: Post comment on PR
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require('fs');
            const body = fs.readFileSync('comment.md', 'utf8');

            const owner = context.repo.owner;
            const repo = context.repo.repo;
            const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;

            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner,
              repo,
              issue_number,
              per_page: 100,
            });

            const marker = '### CI results';
            const botLogin = 'github-actions[bot]';
            const existing = comments.find(c => c.user?.login === botLogin && c.body?.includes(marker));

            if (existing) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner,
                repo,
                comment_id: existing.id,
                body,
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner,
                repo,
                issue_number,
                body,
              });
            }
